epics.title: Admin Billing Access — SUPER_ADMIN-Only

WIDE revoke (19 perms) + mainMenu hide + onMissing:'hide'/re-gate leaks + 14-page beforeLoad guards + seed/integration/degradation tests. OQ-1=WIDE, OQ-2=Option B (both resolved). epics.title: Web color-system fallback for older browsers (oklch/@supports) + admin browser gate
epics.note: 15 atomic tasks across 5 phases (avg complexity 2.1). Critical path 11 tasks deep. Phase 0: regression guard scaffold (T-001, RED first). Phase 1+2+3: design-tokens generator extension with culori/formatSRGB (T-002), VARIANT_TOKEN_MAP 42 entries (T-003), emitVariantTokens/dist regen (T-004), codemod 679 sites (T-005), @repo/icons subtle variant fix (T-006). Integration: i18n es/en/pt (T-007), BrowserGateBanner admin gate CSS.supports+sessionStorage (T-008), dark-mode fallback audit (T-009), Playwright visual parity (T-010), CI guard pipeline wiring (T-011). Testing: full suite smoke (T-012), JSDoc+docs (T-013). Cleanup: PR open (T-014), post-merge registry closeout (T-015). Locked decisions: D2=emitVariantTokens, D5=culori, D6=naming --base-aNN/lNN/lmNN, D1=codemod script, D4+D8=admin CSS.supports+sessionStorage, D7=no vite build.target.
